review_questions: Does the readiness matrix bind current P4 implementation files and tests by sha256?
Are P4-IMPL-01 through P4-IMPL-05 review decisions approved and subject-hash bound?
Do P4 tests, full regression, runtime-boundary-check, review binding aggregate, and git diff checks pass?
Does the dirty worktree policy correctly block actual P4_BUILD_LOCK creation until clean committed inputs exist?
Does this candidate avoid creating P4_BUILD_LOCK, DRD_HARNESS_RELEASE_LOCK, package publishing, or implementation mutations?
